titleStmt.title: SII 9.213: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 213. (A.R. No. 258 of 1905.) ON THE 5TH SLAB SET UP TO THE EAST OF THE DARK ROOM IN THE SAME TEMPLE.

summary.p: This record of excellent poetical merit is unfortunately damaged. It is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 51, Parābhava • • • vāra, Sūrya-grahaṇa, corresponding to A.D. 1126 June 22 Tuesday, the only solar eclipse of the year occurring on this date. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva whose Daṇḍanāyaka Anantapālarasa was ruling over Bēṅgi twelve-thousand and Emmedale six-thousand. He was the son of Mahēśvara-Daṇḍādhipa entitled the Chālukya-kula-mūlastambha and grandson of Bhīma-Daṇḍanāyaka. He is stated to have had the pleasure of seeing Gōvinda-Daṇḍanāyaka, son of his own sister Padumaladēvi and Kṛishṇarāja and younger brother of Lakshma-Dandanāyaka, conquer the Chōḷa country and carry away the elephants, army, treasure and all of the Chōḷa king. Gōvindarasa's grandfather is said to have been Padmanābha and his great grandfather, Gaṇēśvara-Chamūpa. Gōvindarasa was ruling Koṇḍapalli three-hundred and made a gift of some land for the service of the god Tripurāntakēśvara.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē .
traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārā
jādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷati
ḷakaṁ cāḷukyabharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vi
jayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrā
rkkatāraṁ jayantīpurada nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathā
vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyvuttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi samadhi
gatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāsāmaṁtādhipati mahāpra
caṁḍadaṁḍanāyakaṁ vibhudhavaradāyakaṁ sujanaprasannaṁ nuḍidu
mattennaṁ gōtrapavitra parāṁganāputraṁ turayarēvaṁta vairi
kritāntaṁ sāhasōttuṁganayyanasiṁgaṁ nāmādisamastapra
śastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ bhāṇasaverggeḍe manevergga
ḍe daṁḍanāyakananantapāḷarasaru bēṁgi pannircchāsaramumane
mmedaleyaṟusāsiramumanāḷdarasugeyyuttamiralu
Avaraḷiyaṁ mahāpradhānaṁ daṁḍanāyakaṁ gōvindarasaru
ghanasauryyaṁ jananātharājapuradiṁdaṁ kādi taṁdaṁ kumārana
sarbbasvamanaṭṭi muṭṭi piḍitaṁdaṁ dūceyaṁ goṁkanaṁ munidā
kṣēpade dēvanirmmitada cōḷōrbbīśanaṁ tandanōvene suṭṭaṁ pari
yiṭṭu bēṁgipuramaṁ gōvindadaṁḍādhipa . Antenisida daṁḍa
nāyakaṁ gōviṁdaresananvayameṁtene . dharaṇīkāṁteya
madhyadēśamenisirddā madhyadēśaṁ manōharamātmārjjita
pūrbbajanmasukritaṁ munnilladaṁdalli marttyara janmaṁ dore
koḷḷadeṁba mahanīyasthānadoḷpuṭṭi bhāsuratējaṁ
negarddaṁ gaṇēśvaracamūpaṁ vipravaṁśōttamaṁ . Āramaṇī
manōramaṇanagrajaniṣṭaviśiṣṭalōkanistārakananvayāṁ
barasaratsamayēṁdupayōdhiyaṁte gaṁbhīranudāracāru
caritaṁ guṇabhūṣaṇaneṁdu baṇnisalu dhāriṇi padmanābha
nudāttayaśaṁ negarddaṁ dharitriyoḷu . negaḷdirdā padmanā
bhaṁgaṇugina taneyaṁ vīravidviṣṭasēnāmrigāyudhābhīḷakaṇṭhī
ravananupamasauṁdaryyanurbbītaḷabyāptaguṇaṁ kīrtipri
ya kuntaḷaviṣayavadhūmaṁḍanaṁ śāśvatilakṣmigaḍarppādaṁ dha
ritrīnayanakumudinīcaṁdramaṁ kriṣṇarāja . puruṣārtthakkeḍe
vikramakke nele dharmmakkārmmanaudāryyadāgaramoḷpiṁgeṟeva
ṭṭu nirmmaḷategāvāsaṁ nayakkikke saccaritakkāśrayameṁdu
lōkavanituṁ kayvāradiṁ baṇnisuttire pēḷu kriṣṇacamū
panoḷu samanenalukāvaṁ dharācakradoḷu .

varavaṁśamanantaguṇōtkaradineseye jananikuḷamaṁ śā(ṁ)ntaparilagna
kīrttiyadentene vimaḷānvavāyadhāmaṁ bhīma . dvijavaṁśāṁbhōdamārggadyumaṇi
sakaḷasāmantacakrādhināthaṁ vijayaśrīkēḷikaukṣēyakakaḷitabhujādaṁḍanudvṛ
ttavairidhvajinīpradhvāntavidhvaṁsanapaṭutaramārttaṁḍaneṁdartthiyiṁ viśvajanaṁ byāvarṇisutti
rppinamesedadaṭaṁ bhīmadaṁḍādhinātha . śaraṇāyātaśaraṇyaneṁdu vibhavakkāvāsameṁ
du saṁgarabhūbhairavaneṁdiḷāvaḷayamā bhīmātmajātaṁge sādaradiṁdaṁ pesarīye peṁpuvaḍe
daṁ cāturyyakaṁdaṁ mahēśvaradaṁḍādhipanī caḷukyakuḷamūḷastaṁbhaneṁbannegaṁ . tattanaya
nasamanakhiḷajagattiḷakaṁ kīrttivallarīvaḷayitadigbhitti ripunripatikuḷaphaṇabhrittārkṣyana
nantapāḷadaṁḍādhīśa . Odavida mānasikke talemōṟada munname muṁbi mūrttigoṁḍudu
siri keccugoṁḍudu manaṁ bagegoṁḍudu nanni nāṭugoṁḍudu nayamōjegoṁḍudaṟitaṁ ne
legoṁḍDudu rūḍi rūpugoṁḍudu nuḍi rāsigoṁḍudu negartteya tējavanantapāḷana .
Ānuvanīva cautanavanantamagurbbina balpanantavāsthānadoḷādayaṁ miguva tējavanantava
dhīśaneṁdudaṁ tāne taguḷdu mārppadaṭanantavidirccida bhūmipāḷa saṁtānamanokkilikkuva
vinōdavanantavanantapāḷana . Akapaṭadiṁde kaṁḍa parabhūmiparoḷvesageyyarāṣṭrakaṁ
ṭakarenipanyamaṁḍaḷikarāhavadoḷu cīṟutōḍe kādi cōḷikapaḍeyaṁ paḍalvaḍisi kaṁ
civaraṁ sale sūṟegoṁḍa cōḷakaṭakasūṟekāranoḷidirccuvanāvananantapāḷanoḷu . Ā ne
gardanantapāḷacamūnāthana bhagini kriṣṇarājana sati santānite padmaladēvi mahīnuta
nagraje mahēśadaṁḍādhipana . nayanānandamanittu tanna patigatyaudāryya māścaryya
māge yaśaṁ lōkamanellamaṁ baḷase kāṁtāratnameṁboṁdu rūḍiyanutpādisi kri
ṣṇarājana manaṟpadmākarāvāsahamsiyenalu padmaladēvi bhūbhuvanadoḷvikhyātiyaṁ
tāḷdidaḷu . Enisida padmaladēvigamanūnanayaśāḷi kriṣṇarājaṁgaṁ sajjanavinutaṁ pu
ṭṭidanavyanupamitaṁ lakṣmarājadaṁḍādhīśa . bhujadaṁḍōgrapratāpakkagidu ripu
kuḷaṁ gūḍugoṁḍirdu vīradhvajanemmaṁ kolgumārkkāvarō śaraṇamenalkeṁdu kaṁgeṭṭu bā
yabiṭṭu jitājikṣōṇigākaṁpise negarddadaṭaṁgāgaraṁ tībratējaṁ nijavaṁśabyōma
vibhrājitavidhuvenipaṁ lakṣmadaṁḍādhinātha . Anujātaṁ lakṣmarājaṁganupamamahi
maṁ śatrunirbbhēdi cōḷāvanipākaṁpaṁ jagadbhuṁbhukanenipadaṭaṁ pūrbbadigvārddhivēḷā
vanarājadrājahaṁsaṁ subhaṭajanacamatkārananyāṁganādūranudāraṁ kīrttiva
llīparikaritadiśābhitti gōviṁdarāja . gaganaṁ nāṭyagrihaṁ yaśōnaṭige vakṣōmaṁ
ḍaḷaṁ prājyarājyagrihaṁ śrīge kripāṇadhāre viḷasaddhārāgrihaṁ vīralakṣmige vaktraṁ
jananīgrihaṁ sakaḷavidyālakṣmigeṁbī pogarttege kēḷīgrihamādanēṁ piriya
nō gōviṁdadaṁḍādhipaṁ . kaliyō kharggasahāyanivane jagaddāridryavidrāvaṇaṁ
nile mātāḍuvane todaḷgeḍeguḍaṁ cāritrasaṁpannanē kalikālakkoṟegaṭṭida śu
ciye gaṁgāsūnu gaṁbhīranē gelevaṁdaṁ jaḷarāsiyaṁ piriyarārgōviṁdarājaṁbaraṁ .
moneyoḷu pārade maṁtrataṁtrabaḷavaṁ sāmartthyadiṁdaṁ jayāṁgane māṟānta ma
dāneyaṁ kudureyaṁ bhaṁḍāramaṁ ratnamaṁ dhanamaṁ beḷgoḍeyaṁ viḷāsiniyaraṁ gō
viṁdadaṁḍādhināthana dōrdaṁḍakripāṇadhāreyoḷagirddākarṣaṇaṁ māḍuvaḷu .
manavarataṁ bērppanitaṁ bērppaṁge tanna kayyāre jagajjanavinutanittu kri
vattigaṁḍavesaraṁ paḍeda toḍarddahitaroḍanebērppavarō
ka kaṁkhaṇaravadi nuḍivudu balagayi tānēnnuḍigu
gōvinda . Apabhayanavanīvanitālapanādarṣaṁ
ripumadaharaṁ kāśyapagōtrapavitrananu
ndarasadaṁḍanāyakaṁ koṁḍupaḷḷimūno
ṣṭanigrahaśiṣṭapratipāḷana(ṁ)mmāḍiyā
kramavarṣada 51 neya parābhavasaṁ
mavāradaṁdu sūryyagrahaṇanimi
rada śrīmattripurāṁtakadēvaraṁga
baigina nivēdyakkaṁ baigina pūjegaṁ A
ragrāsanakkaṁ khaṁḍasphuṭikajīrṇnōddhāra
ḷagaṇa piṭṭamapūḷi Ābaḷiya meḷi
gaṇapātaḍi cāpalamaḍuge tumanāya
hitaṁ dhārāpūrbbakaṁmāḍi biṭṭaru Ī dharmma
pratipāḷisidaṁge gaṁge vāraṇasi kurukṣētramarghya
lu gōsahasraṁgaḷa(ṁ)mmāḍida phalamakku . Ī dharmmamana
mahāpātakaṁge Ī tīrtthaṁgaḷalu gōbrāhmaṇasahasravadheyaṁ
ḍida mahāpātakamakku . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasētuṁ nripāṇāṁ
kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ . sarbbānētān bhāginaṟpārtthivēṁ
nu bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ . svadattāṁ para
vā yō harēti vasundharā . śaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭā
jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 9.213 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
